title: Korak 15

challengeFiles.name: script

tests.text: Your maxNum variable should be assigned the result of the finding the maximum number between the numbers 3, 125, 55, 24.
You should not hardcode the value of 125 to the maxNum variable. Make sure to use the Math.max() method instead.
You should log the value of maxNum to the console.
Your minNum variable should be assigned the result of the finding the minimum number between the numbers 6, 90, 14, 90, 2.
You should not hardcode the value of 2 to the minNum variable. Make sure to use the Math.min() method instead.
You should log the value of minNum to the console.

description:
U prethodnim lekcijama, naučili ste kako da dobijete maksimalne i minimalne vrednosti iz opsega brojeva na ovaj način:

Math.max(1, 2, 3, 4, 5); // 5
Math.min(1, 2, 3, 4, 5); // 1

Kreirajte varijablu nazvanu maxNum i dodelite joj rezultat pronalaženja najvećeg broja između brojeva 3, 125, 55, 24. Zatim, logujte vrednost maxNum u konzolu.

Ispod toga, kreirajte varijablu nazvanu minNum i dodelite joj rezultat pronalaženja najmanjeg broja između brojeva 6, 90, 14, 90, 2. Zatim, logujte vrednost minNum u konzolu.
